title: E-participation adoption quantitative articles
author: Naranjo-Zolotov, Mijail
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The data-set contains a list of articles that studied e-participation adoption from the quantitative perspective from year 2000 onwards. The list provide a set of data that includes these fields: year of publication, source, theory, independent Variable name, dependent variable name, beta values, Significant/Not Significant, R square, method, keywords, type of study, findings from Abstract / Conclusion, ICT platform, sample population, kind of population, country of study. Based on this data-set, this article was published: "E-participation adoption models research in the last 17 years: A weight and meta-analytical review"
steps_raw: The data-set contains a list of articles that studied e-participation adoption from the quantitative perspective from year 2000 onwards. The list provide a set of data that includes these fields: year of publication, source, theory, independent Variable name, dependent variable name, beta values, Significant/Not Significant, R square, method, keywords, type of study, findings from Abstract / Conclusion, ICT platform, sample population, kind of population, country of study. Based on this data-set, this article was published: "E-participation adoption models research in the last 17 years: A weight and meta-analytical review"
keywords: E-participation, Meta-analysis, Beta values, regression, SEM
